Q: Solve for x: 7x - 3 = 19.
A: To solve for x, we first need to isolate the variable. We do this by adding 3 to both sides of the equation:

7x - 3 + 3 = 19 + 3

This simplifies to:

7x = 22

Next, we need to divide both sides of the equation by 7 to solve for x:

(7x) / 7 = 22 / 7

This gives us:

x = 22 / 7

So, x = 22 / 7.
